approval_records.rationale: The route readiness plan item is supported by source baseline, provider outputs, browser evidence, and a resolved reviewer contradiction.

beads.title: Implement route readiness and synthesis handoff gates

executive_summary.text: APR v18 has a traceable final plan for route readiness and synthesis gates. The packet keeps provider evidence, reviewer deltas, waiver visibility, tests, rollback, and approvals together for implementation handoff.

high_risk_decisions.rationale: Synthesis evidence is produced by the synthesis call, so it gates final handoff rather than synthesis prompt submission.
high_risk_decisions.title: Split synthesis prompt readiness from final handoff evidence

implementation_sequence.title: Wire route readiness, provider evidence, and final handoff gate checks

rollback_points.description: Return to pre-synthesis route readiness if provider evidence, quorum, or waiver records diverge.

test_plan.expected: route readiness fixture validates and synthesis gates are non-circular
provider comparison records include provider ids, contradiction ids, and traceability anchors

unresolved_questions.question: Confirm the live Oracle selector manifest still exposes the required highest-visible reasoning controls before cutover.

waivers_and_degradations.label: waived
waivers_and_degradations.summary: Fallback browser/manual-import conditions must remain visible in the handoff packet and cannot be treated as a clean run.
